tools.name: eslint_check
tools.description: ESLint code quality check (dry-run). Returns violations. Runs in Storefront context.

paths.description: File paths or directories to lint. Defaults to current directory.

tools.name: eslint_fix
tools.description: ESLint auto-fix. Applies code style fixes in Storefront context.

paths.description: File paths or directories to fix. Defaults to current directory.

tools.name: stylelint_check
tools.description: Stylelint SCSS/CSS check (dry-run). Returns violations in Storefront context.

paths.description: File paths or glob patterns. Defaults to '**/*.scss'.

tools.name: stylelint_fix
tools.description: Stylelint auto-fix. Applies style fixes in Storefront context.

paths.description: File paths or glob patterns. Defaults to '**/*.scss'.

tools.name: jest_run
tools.description: Jest test runner for Storefront. Returns test results.

testPathPatterns.description: Regex pattern for test file paths (--testPathPatterns)

tools.name: webpack_build
tools.description: Webpack build for Storefront. Compiles vanilla JS assets.
